# vector: enum_resp_2entries
# ENUM_RESP: total 10, page contains long user PI state and system iq_meas scope
# raw  = frame before COBS (ver|type|flags|seq|len|payload|crc32c, all LE)
# wire = COBS(raw) + 0x00 delimiter, the actual SCI-link octets
raw: 5a8300030052000a000000020012a000000400070001002d00636f6e74726f6c6c65722e63757272656e745f6c6f6f702e70695f712e696e7465677261746f725f737461746544a00000000002000100070069715f6d656173946d7235
wire: 035a8302030252020a010102020312a001020402070201022d30636f6e74726f6c6c65722e63757272656e745f6c6f6f702e70695f712e696e7465677261746f725f737461746544a00101010202020102070c69715f6d656173946d723500
